name: getGoogle
description: Search the web using Google for current news, events, facts, or real-time information. Always execute a fresh search — never reuse results from conversation history. If a previous search returned no useful results, refine the query and search again. A query is required.

num.description: Number of results to return (default from toolsconfig, max 10).

safe.description: Safe search level: off, active, or high (optional).

hl.description: UI language hint, e.g., de, en (optional).
